title: Implement partner invitation link system

requirements.text: Create a backend data structure to store invitation codes with metadata including code string, expiration timestamp, relationship ID, creator principal, and used status
acceptanceCriteria: Invitation data structure includes unique code string
Stores relationship ID to link invitation to correct relationship
Tracks whether invitation has been used
Includes expiration timestamp for invitation validity

requirements.text: Implement backend function to generate unique invitation links that return a shareable code string for partners to use when creating their accounts
acceptanceCriteria: Function generates cryptographically unique invitation codes
Invitation codes are associated with the creator's relationship
Function returns the invitation code to be shared
Prevents unauthorized users from generating invitations

requirements.text: Implement backend function to validate invitation codes and automatically add partners to relationships when they sign up using valid invitation links

quotes: Allow partners to automatically join your relationship after signing up

acceptanceCriteria: Validates invitation code exists and is not expired
Checks invitation has not already been used
Automatically creates partner entry in the relationship
Marks invitation as used after successful partner addition
Returns error for invalid or expired invitation codes

requirements.text: Create frontend component to display and copy invitation links for sharing with partners

quotes: Generate unique invitation links that partners can click to create their accounts

acceptanceCriteria: Component displays generated invitation link in readable format
Provides copy-to-clipboard functionality for easy sharing
Shows visual confirmation when link is copied
Displays instructions for partners on how to use the invitation link

requirements.text: Replace the AddPartnerModal and PartnerForm components with the new invitation link generation interface in the Dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Remove or hide AddPartnerModal from Dashboard
Replace 'Add Partner' button functionality to show invitation link generator
Maintain existing partner display grid and PartnerCard components
Ensure Dashboard layout remains consistent with warm, nurturing theme

requirements.text: Create frontend signup flow that accepts invitation codes as URL parameters and automatically joins partners to relationships after Internet Identity authentication

quotes: partners can click to create their accounts
automatically join your relationship after signing up

acceptanceCriteria: Extract invitation code from URL parameters when present
Display invitation acceptance interface before or after authentication
Call backend validation function with invitation code after user authenticates
Show success message when partner is successfully added to relationship
Handle and display errors for invalid or expired invitation codes
Redirect to dashboard after successful invitation acceptance

requirements.text: Add React Query hooks for invitation link generation and validation operations with proper cache invalidation
acceptanceCriteria: Create mutation hook for generating invitation links
Create mutation hook for validating and accepting invitation codes
Invalidate relationship queries after successful invitation acceptance
Handle loading and error states appropriately

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or useInternetIdentity.tsx
Preserve existing partner dashboard display functionality
Keep warm, nurturing visual theme with rose/pink color palette
nonGoals: Building daily hearts feature (that comes later)
Building Zoom meeting link storage (that comes later)
Adding manual partner addition forms back
